statement: The parties agreed on a contract price of $148,500 for the goods.

provenance.quote: Buyer shall pay Seller the sum of $148,500 for the Goods.

statement: The contract covered 500 granite widget assemblies under Specification GS-11.

provenance.quote: The Goods consist of 500 granite widget assemblies conforming to Specification GS-11.

statement: Delivery was complete upon tender at Buyer's loading dock.

provenance.quote: Delivery is complete upon tender at Buyer's loading dock.

statement: Granite Supply tendered all 500 assemblies on March 14, 2026, before the deadline.

provenance.quote: Granite Supply tendered all 500 assemblies on March 14, 2026,

statement: Plaintiff alleges at least 120 assemblies had hairline cracks.

provenance.quote: at least 120 of the assemblies exhibited hairline cracks

statement: Plaintiff rejected the shipment and demanded a full refund.

provenance.quote: We are rejecting the shipment and demand a full refund of $148,500.
